section_title: Real builds. Real metrics. Touchable demos.
section_intro: Two are live below — paste a CV into the optimizer, play the latest video from our channel. The rest you can stress-test on the intro call.

cards.title: The Always-On Outbound Engine
cards.description: High-velocity cold-email + GHL CRM + reply automation for a US outbound consultancy.
cards.brief: Stack: Cloudflare Workers + KV + Instantly + GHL. Idempotent sentinel keys, cross-run dedup, per-campaign kill switch, dual-path reply detection. Replaces a 4-SDR team at ~1/10th the cost.

cards.title: Enterprise Adoption Driver
cards.description: Production GenAI / RAG product for a US enterprise SaaS.
cards.brief: PM-led from problem framing to shipped feature. Multi-LLM routing, eval harness, prompt-cache-aware cost model, per-tenant config. The latency win came from prompt-cache hits + tenant-aware routing.

cards.title: Multi-Lingual CV Optimizer
cards.description: Live SaaS that re-writes a CV in the target locale + tunes for a pasted job description. Paste a CV right here.
cards.brief: Cloudflare Pages + Worker + Gemini backend. Per-field langdetect validators, recruiter-proxy eval, golden-screenshot diff. Eval-first development — ships only when 95% of fields pass.

cards.title: ProdCraft AI Video Studio
cards.description: Script → voice → Remotion → upload, fully automated. Weekly cadence, near-zero marginal cost.
cards.brief: Voice clone via Chatterbox HF Space, visual generation via Gemini, render via Remotion, upload via YouTube Data API. From topic prompt to public video in eight minutes.

metrics.label: marginal cost / video
metrics._source_real: Chatterbox + Gemini free tier + Remotion local render

cards.title: The 14-Day Shipping Pipeline
cards.description: Expo + EAS Build → TestFlight & Play Store, AI features wired in (transcription, summaries, agents).
cards.brief: Per-app registry, EAS cloud builds (no Mac required), 5-principle app design framework, 2-pass security audit. Backend tracks: Cloudflare Worker + Modal cron OR Supabase.

cards.title: Claude Code Operator Stack
cards.description: Multi-agent orchestration, MCP servers, internal copilots, anneal audit loops for self-hardening code.
cards.brief: Dynamic workflows, agent teams, sub-agent delegation per task complexity. Anneal: iterative audit loop until convergence. MCP servers for custom integrations.

metrics.label: AI systems shipped
metrics._source_real: cv-optimizer, ProdCraft, humanizer, anneal, job_search_v2, youtube-analyzer, mobile_apps template, plus client work
